# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Apr 2, 2026)
## OVERVIEW 
Today's development focused on expanding the plugin registry with a new feature, specifically the addition of a BSC memes plugin.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### New Plugin Integration
- A new plugin, `@elizaos/plugin-bsc-memes`, has been added to the registry, enhancing the available functionalities. ([#329](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/329))

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
- **feat: add @elizaos/plugin-bsc-memes** ([#329](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/329)): This pull request introduces a new plugin for BSC memes.

## CLOSED ISSUES
No issues were closed today.

## NEW ISSUES
No new issues were reported today.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
No issues had significant activity today.
